segments.text: Jesus said to his disciples:
Things that cause people to stumble are bound to come, but woe to anyone through whom they come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It would be better for them to be thrown into the sea with a millstone tied around their neck than to cause one of these little ones to stumble.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So watch yourselves. If your brother or sister sins against you, rebuke them; and if they repent, forgive them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Even if they sin against you seven times in a day and seven times come back to you saying 'I repent,' you must forgive them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The apostles said to the Lord,
Increase our faith!
segments.speaker: The Apostles

segments.text: He replied,
If you have faith as small as a mustard seed, you can say to this mulberry tree, 'Be uprooted and planted in the sea,' and it will obey you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Suppose one of you has a servant plowing or looking after the sheep. Will he say to the servant when he comes in from the field, 'Come along now and sit down to eat'?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Won't he rather say, 'Prepare my supper, get yourself ready and wait on me while I eat and drink; after that you may eat and drink'?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Will he thank the servant because he did what he was told to do?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So you also, when you have done everything you were told to do, should say, 'We are unworthy servants; we have only done our duty.'
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: Jesus Heals Ten Men With Leprosy

segments.text: Now on his way to Jerusalem, Jesus traveled along the border between Samaria and Galilee.
As he was going into a village, ten men who had leprosy met him. They stood at a distance
Jesus, Master, have pity on us!
segments.speaker: Lepers

segments.text: When he saw them, he said,
Go, show yourselves to the priests.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And as they went, they were cleansed.
One of them, when he saw he was healed, came back, praising God in a loud voice.
He threw himself at Jesus' feet and thanked him—and he was a Samaritan.
Jesus asked,
Were not all ten cleansed? Where are the other nine?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Has no one returned to give praise to God except this foreigner?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then he said to him,
Rise and go; your faith has made you well.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: The Coming of the Kingdom of God

segments.text: Once, on being asked by the Pharisees when the kingdom of God would come, Jesus replied,
The coming of the kingdom of God is not something that can be observed,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: nor will people say, 'Here it is,' or 'There it is,' because the kingdom of God is in your midst.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then he said to his disciples,
The time is coming when you will long to see one of the days of the Son of Man, but you will not see it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: People will tell you, 'There he is!' or 'Here he is!' Do not go running off after them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For the Son of Man in his day will be like the lightning, which flashes and lights up the sky from one end to the other.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But first he must suffer many things and be rejected by this generation.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Just as it was in the days of Noah, so also will it be in the days of the Son of Man.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: People were eating, drinking, marrying and being given in marriage up to the day Noah entered the ark. Then the flood came and destroyed them all.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It was the same in the days of Lot. People were eating and drinking, buying and selling, planting and building.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But the day Lot left Sodom, fire and sulfur rained down from heaven and destroyed them all.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It will be just like this on the day the Son of Man is revealed.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: On that day no one who is on the housetop, with possessions inside, should go down to get them. Likewise, no one in the field should go back for anything.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Remember Lot's wife!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whoever tries to keep their life will lose it, and whoever loses their life will preserve it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I tell you, on that night two people will be in one bed; one will be taken and the other left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Two women will be grinding grain together; one will be taken and the other left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Where, Lord?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: they asked. He replied,
Where there is a dead body, there the vultures will gather.
segments.speaker: Jesus
